h2h_summary: Curaçao and Ivory Coast have no previous official meeting, making their 2026 World Cup Group E clash a historic first encounter between the two nations.
team_style_home: Curaçao under Dick Advocaat deploy a disciplined 4-3-3 or 4-4-2 mid-block, defending compactly and looking to hurt opponents on direct counter-attacks through the pace of Tahith Chong.
team_style_away: Ivory Coast under Emerse Fae play a dynamic 4-3-3 with a compact midfield block, quick transitions, and pace-driven wide attackers who are most dangerous immediately after winning the ball.
wc_history_home: Curaçao are making their debut at the FIFA World Cup in 2026, having become the smallest nation by population and area ever to qualify for the tournament.
wc_history_away: Ivory Coast are appearing at their fourth World Cup (2006, 2010, 2014, 2026), returning after a 12-year absence but have never advanced beyond the group stage.
group_context: Group E features heavy favourites Germany alongside Ecuador, Ivory Coast, and debutants Curaçao; Ivory Coast and Ecuador are battling for the second knockout berth, while Curaçao will be targeting a famous upset to announce themselves on the world stage.
strengths_home: Disciplined defensive organization under an experienced European coach
Dangerous counter-attacking pace through Tahith Chong
Strong European-based squad with Netherlands football experience
strengths_away: High-scoring attack — most goals in CAF qualifying with 25 in 10 games
Pace and creativity across wide positions with Amad Diallo and Yan Diomande
Excellent recent form including a 2-1 win over France in their final World Cup warm-up
